# atlassian_jira_project_issue_type_screen_scheme (Resource)

Associates a Jira Cloud project with an issue type screen scheme.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_project_issue_type_screen_scheme" "example" {
  project_id                  = atlassian_jira_project.example.id
  issue_type_screen_scheme_id = atlassian_jira_issue_type_screen_scheme.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issue_type_screen_scheme_id` (String) The ID of the issue type screen scheme. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
